name: Swedish Coconut Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and shortening until smooth.
2. Add the sugar, vanilla extract, baking ammonia, and salt to the butter mixture. Mix well.
3. Gradually add in the coconut and sifted flour mixture until combined.
4. Shape the dough into walnut-sized balls.
5. Place the balls about 2 1/2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Preheat the oven to 325°F (163°C).
7. Bake for 15 minutes, without opening the oven door during baking.
